titleStmt.title: SII 41.212: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 212. (A.R. No. 430 of 1905.) Tiruttaṇi, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north, west and south walls of the central shrine in the Viraṭṭānēśvara temple at Tiruttaṇi.

summary.p: Sale of land, free of taxes, by the sabhā of Jananātha-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēnmalai-Taṇiyal-nāḍu (a district) of Jayaṅgoṇḍa-Chōḻamaṇḍalam to Pārthasārathi (mentioned in the above inscription) for feeding pilgrims going to and returning from Śrivēnkaḍam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun=tanakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyun=taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ
kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtaru Īḻamaṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamun=tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇaṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻi Ellā yāṇṭu toḻuteḻa viḷa
ṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiñarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājakesari vaṉmarāṉa śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalat
tu meṉmalaittaṇiyal nāṭṭu jananātac caturvvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom bhūmi nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu tāmaṟkoṭṭatut tāmarnāṭṭup pāñciṟaikaḷattūr
kīḻvikkiramaciṅkac caturvvetimaṅkalattu śrīkraṣṇapurattu Eḻun=taruḷi niṉṟa Emperumāṉākku nāṭṭu nāṭṭuttaṉṉaṭiyār tirunāḷil śrīveṅkaṭayātrai povāṟkum varuvāṟkum Āhāram
Iṭuvataṟku sabhaiyom viṟṟu Iṟai Iḻiccik kuṭutta nilamāvatu śrījaṉanātavatikkuk kiḻakku śrīrājarāja vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ caturattut teṉkiḻcārk kuḻi
Aiñpatteḻum Iṅke muṉṟāñ caturattup pattiyappaṭṭi nikkit teṟkaṭaiyak kuḻi Aṟunūṟṟaiñce mukkāle yiraṇṭu māvum Iṅke Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcaturattu
vaṭakiḻcārk kuḻi nūṟṟaiñpattoṉpate nāṉmāvarai kiḻaraiyum Iṅke muṉṟāñ caturattu vaṭamelcārk kuḻi Eṇṇuṟṟirupatteṭṭe mukkālē yaraikkāṇiyum Iṅke muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟ
ṟu muṉṟāñ caturattut tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyār nilattukkuk kiḻakkum teṟkumākak kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟaṟupattu nālaraiye Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇi mun=tirikaiyum Iṅke nālāñ caturattu
m piṟaṉāṭṭu nākakumārak kramavittaṉār Iṟainilattukku vaṭamelcārk kuḻi nāṟpattoṉpataraiye Oru mākāṇiyumākak kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattaiññūṟṟu pattaiñce nālumā
kkāṇi mun=tirikai kiḻaraiyum nāṅkaḷe viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu rājarājap pereri kiḻp puṟaṅkarai
kku vaṭakkum rājarājappereri karaikkuk kiḻakkum Erittūmpil niṉṟum pon=ta puṟaṅkaraik kālukkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellai tto Ivvūr Umiyūrvāmaṉa kramavittaṉ
Iḻiccuk kuṭuttom
purattu Eḻuntaruḷi niṉṟa Emperumāṉ kaṉmi pārtthasāradhi
Digital edition of SII 41.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
